item.title: America is agaisnt theocracy’s… until they can suporot one agaisnt china
item.description:
America is agaisnt theocracy’s… until they can suporot one agaisnt china. The US is agaisnt monarchy’s… until they can support one against Iran or in Saudi or the UAE. Don’t ever let them tell u who the good guys are.



(Feed generated with FetchRSS)

item.description:

Do y’all not understand that this is like very much the goal landlord is absolutely add zero value to the chain of supply here they only extract value

item.title: The end of the cycle of abuse must be the demand not simply a quieting or simplifying or dismissal of that abuse
item.description:

item.title: Everyone hates us, it’s damn well time we join them because they have damn good reasons
